metadata.notes: Comprehensive security reconnaissance data for LLM analysis

critical_severity_vulnerabilities.title: Oracle WebLogic Server Vulnerability
critical_severity_vulnerabilities.description: A critical vulnerability (CVE-2020-2551) affecting Oracle WebLogic Server was detected. This could lead to remote code execution.
critical_severity_vulnerabilities.remediation: Update Oracle WebLogic Server to the latest patched version immediately. Review access controls to the console.

critical_severity_vulnerabilities.title: JMX-Console Authentication Bypass
critical_severity_vulnerabilities.description: JMX-Console is accessible without authentication, which could lead to remote code execution or sensitive information disclosure.
critical_severity_vulnerabilities.remediation: Secure the JMX-Console with strong authentication or restrict access to trusted networks only. Remove it if not essential.

high_severity_vulnerabilities.title: Oracle WebLogic Server Vulnerability
high_severity_vulnerabilities.description: A high-severity vulnerability (CVE-2022-21371) affecting Oracle WebLogic Server was detected. This could lead to remote code execution or sensitive information disclosure.
high_severity_vulnerabilities.remediation: Apply the latest security patches for Oracle WebLogic Server to address CVE-2022-21371. Restrict access to affected services.

high_severity_vulnerabilities.title: Local File Inclusion (LFI) via WSRP URL Parameter
high_severity_vulnerabilities.description: A local file inclusion vulnerability (CVE-2023-22047) was identified through the 'wsrp-url' parameter, potentially allowing access to arbitrary files on the server.
high_severity_vulnerabilities.remediation: Sanitize and validate all user-supplied input, especially URL parameters, to prevent local file inclusion. Implement a strong allowlist policy for file access.

high_severity_vulnerabilities.title: Apache byterange filter DoS (CVE-2011-3192)
high_severity_vulnerabilities.description: The Apache web server is vulnerable to a denial of service attack when numerous overlapping byte ranges are requested.
high_severity_vulnerabilities.evidence:
VULNERABLE:
  Apache byterange filter DoS
    State: VULNERABLE
    IDs:  BID:49303  CVE:CVE-2011-3192
      The Apache web server is vulnerable to a denial of service attack when numerous
      overlapping byte ranges are requested.
    Disclosure date: 2011-08-19
    References:
      https://www.tenable.com/plugins/nessus/55976
      https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2011-3192
      https://seclists.org/fulldisclosure/2011/Aug/175
      https://www.securityfocus.com/bid/49303
high_severity_vulnerabilities.remediation: Update Apache HTTP Server to a version patched against CVE-2011-3192. Consider implementing WAF rules to detect and block suspicious byte-range requests.

high_severity_vulnerabilities.title: Nmap script execution failed
high_severity_vulnerabilities.description: Nmap script execution failed for CVE-2017-1001000, indicating a potential issue with the scanning process or a deeply hidden vulnerability.
high_severity_vulnerabilities.evidence: ERROR: Script execution failed (use -d to debug)
high_severity_vulnerabilities.remediation: Re-run the Nmap scan with debugging enabled (-d) to get more information on why the script failed. Manually investigate the host for vulnerabilities related to CVE-2017-1001000.

medium_severity_vulnerabilities.title: Exposure of Behat Configuration File
medium_severity_vulnerabilities.description: A Behat configuration file (.yml.dist) is publicly accessible, potentially exposing sensitive testing or application configuration details.
medium_severity_vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove the publicly accessible Behat configuration file or restrict access using web server configurations (e.g., .htaccess, Nginx directives). Ensure sensitive information is not stored in such files.

medium_severity_vulnerabilities.title: Nmap script execution failed
medium_severity_vulnerabilities.description: Nmap script execution failed for CVE-2014-3704, indicating a potential issue with the scanning process or a deeply hidden vulnerability.
medium_severity_vulnerabilities.evidence: ERROR: Script execution failed (use -d to debug)
medium_severity_vulnerabilities.remediation: Re-run the Nmap scan with debugging enabled (-d) to get more information on why the script failed. Manually investigate the host for vulnerabilities related to CVE-2014-3704.
